title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Video explains diffusion models as a process and framework rather than a fixed architecture, covering their progression, strengths, weaknesses, and implementation approaches like DiT. The content covers the theoretical foundations, practical applications, and historical context of diffusion-based generative modeling.
